basic_details.job_title: Periyar University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Periyar University has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. PU/R/Estt.R5/New GL Permission 2026-2027/001100/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Guest Faculty position. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. in Master of Business Administration (MBA) as per UGC norms are eligible to apply offline through the official Periyar University website. The application process is open until 07 July 2026, followed by a walk-in interview on 09 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate with NET/ SET/ Ph.D in Master of Business Administration (MBA) as per UGC Norms
qualification.details: Post Graduate with NET/ SET/ Ph.D in Master of Business Administration (MBA) as per UGC Norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Periyar University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.periyaruniversity.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Periyar University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Periyar University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Periyar University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Post Graduate with NET/ SET/ Ph.D in Master of Business Administration (MBA) as per UGC Norms.

content_sections.heading: Periyar University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Periyar University Guest Faculty Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Periyar University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.periyaruniversity.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Periyar University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Periyar University Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Guest Faculty position at Periyar University is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Guest Faculty position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Guest Faculty position, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree with NET/SET/Ph.D in Master of Business Administration (MBA), as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Periyar University Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Periyar University Guest Faculty recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Periyar University is recruiting for a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Guest Faculty - Management Studies.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview scheduled for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview for the Guest Faculty position is scheduled to be held on 09-07-2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty position at Periyar University is on a contractual basis. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the university's requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Periyar University located?
faq.answer: Periyar University is located in Salem, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 636011.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of Periyar University, which is https://www.periyaruniversity.ac.in.
